use anyhow::Context;

fn process_records(records: &[Record]) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<Processed>> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for record in records {
        // BAD: anyhow context formatting allocates on every iteration
        let parsed = parse_record(record)
            .with_context(|| format!("failed to parse record id={}", record.id))?;
        let validated = validate(parsed)
            .with_context(|| format!("validation failed for record id={}", record.id))?;
        results.push(validated);
    }
    Ok(results)
}

struct Record { id: u64, data: String }
struct Processed { id: u64, value: i64 }

fn parse_record(r: &Record) -> anyhow::Result<Processed> {
    Ok(Processed { id: r.id, value: r.data.parse()? })
}

fn validate(p: Processed) -> anyhow::Result<Processed> {
    Ok(p)
}
